text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Will you let me rant for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I got a free scratch-off raffle ticket while<n>I was
out shopping. You know the<n>kind—find three of
the same number,<n>win a prize.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So I tried my luck, and guess what<n>numbers I got?
Seven, seven... three.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I wonder if anyone actually wins<n>those
things.
